title: Anyone using Clay and monday together?
excerpt: Hey there. I use clay tables for a lot of lead generation. It works pretty well for that and would maybe good to sync some data between there and my monday account. Anyone running something like this currently?

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
